name: ClipBox
summary: The ClipBox class groups multiple clip planes under a single identifier.

constructors.name: ClipBox
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the ClipBox class with 6 clip planes.

methods.name: Delete
methods.summary: Deletes the clip box from the application view. The application view must be visible.

methods.name: Insert
methods.summary: Creates a new clip box to the application view. The application view must be visible.

methods.name: Modify
methods.summary: Modifies the clip box position in the application view. The application view must be visible.

properties.name: ClipPlanes
properties.summary: Gets or sets the clip planes contained by this clip box.

properties.name: View
properties.summary: Gets the view the clip box belongs to.
